title: Silky Vietnamese Chicken Noodles
description: A rich and savory Vietnamese dish featuring chicken, noodles, and nuts, perfect for a lazy Sunday. The combination of bitter and silky textures creates a delightful culinary experience.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together fish sauce, soy sauce, honey, and grated ginger to make the marinade.
Add the chicken to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and cook the chopped peanuts until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the peanuts and chicken.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the silky noodles hot, garnished with additional peanuts if desired.
